summary: Tested iteration 32 features: Registration with 3 roles, Producer 82% commission display, Admin country selector, Influencer dashboard with email verification/pending/create code. Most features working correctly with one critical issue.

critical.issue: Backend .env has PLATFORM_COMMISSION=0.20 (20%) but frontend displays 18%. User requested 18% commission.

ui_bugs.issue: Super admin is redirected to /super-admin and cannot access /admin route where the country selector for analytics is located

issues: Commission rate text shows '20%' from API but labels show '18%' - inconsistent

passed_tests: Registration page shows 3 role options: Cliente, Vendedor, Influencer
Producer Payments page shows 'Your Earnings (82%)' and 'Platform Fee (18%)' labels
Create Admin modal has 'País asignado (para analytics)' country dropdown for regular admin role
Influencer dashboard shows email verification banner with 6-digit code input when email not verified
Influencer dashboard shows 'Cuenta pendiente de aprobación' banner when status is pending
Influencer dashboard shows 'Crea tu código de descuento' card when status is active and no code exists
POST /api/influencer/create-code validates unique code - returns error for duplicate codes
POST /api/influencer/create-code prevents creating second code for same influencer
Backend tests: 15/15 passed (registration, auth, admin analytics, influencer endpoints)
Super admin login works and redirects to /super-admin
Producer login works and shows payments page with commission info
action_items: CRITICAL: Update backend/.env PLATFORM_COMMISSION from 0.20 to 0.18 to match frontend display of 18%
MEDIUM: Allow super_admin to access /admin route with AdminOverview for analytics country selector, or add analytics with country selector to SuperAdminLayout
critical_code_review_comments: Backend PLATFORM_COMMISSION=0.20 (20%) does not match frontend display of 18% - this is a data inconsistency
AdminLayout redirects super_admin to /super-admin, preventing access to AdminOverview with country selector
seed_data_creation: Created test influencers: test_influencer_iter32@test.com and test_influencer2_iter32@test.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 32 features mostly working. Key issue: PLATFORM_COMMISSION in backend/.env is 0.20 (20%) but frontend displays 18%. Super admin cannot access /admin route with analytics country selector due to redirect in AdminLayout. Influencer dashboard at /influencer/dashboard (not /influencer) shows email verification banner, pending approval banner, and create code card correctly based on status.

registration_3_roles.details: Cliente, Vendedor, Influencer options visible on /register page

producer_commission_82_percent.details: Frontend shows 82%/18% labels but backend returns 20% commission rate. Need to update backend .env

admin_country_selector.details: Country selector exists in AdminOverview but super_admin is redirected away from /admin route

create_admin_country_field.details: Create Admin modal shows 'País asignado (para analytics)' dropdown for regular admin role

influencer_email_verification_banner.details: Shows 'Verifica tu email' banner with 6-digit code input when email_verified=false

influencer_pending_approval_banner.details: Shows 'Cuenta pendiente de aprobación' banner when status=pending

influencer_create_code_card.details: Shows 'Crea tu código de descuento' card when status=active and no code exists

influencer_create_code_unique_validation.details: POST /api/influencer/create-code validates unique code across all influencers
